title: New top local AI image generator is here! Already uncensored
summary: Krea 2 is an open-source AI image generator for local use, integrated with ComfyUI and available on Hugging Face. The tool supports fine-tuning via LoRA training and is presented as uncensored for image generation.
writeup: The video covers Krea 2, an open-source AI image generator that runs locally through ComfyUI and ships without content filtering. The local-inference angle matters for anyone weighing on-device workflows against hosted services. Key takeaways: Krea 2 integrates directly with ComfyUI for local generation, and it supports LoRA fine-tuning via the Ostris AI toolkit.
